capabilities.name: Version Upgrade Planning
capabilities.description: Assess upgrade path, identify breaking changes, deprecations, and module compatibility. Build phased upgrade plan with cutover strategy.
examples: Plan upgrade from Odoo 17 to Odoo 19
Identify deprecated API methods in custom modules
Build upgrade timeline with staging and production cutover

capabilities.name: Migration Scripts
capabilities.description: Write pre-migration, post-migration, and end-migration scripts using env.cr.execute, env.ref, and openupgradelib helpers.
examples: Add a pre-migration script to rename a column
Create a post-migration script to recalculate computed fields
Use openupgradelib to migrate many2many relations

capabilities.name: Data Migration
capabilities.description: Migrate master data, transactions, attachments, and configurations across versions using ORM, SQL, ETL patterns, and external_id preservation.
examples: Migrate partner records with XML-IDs preserved
Extract and transform invoice data from legacy system
Load configuration data via CSV in new version

capabilities.name: Compatibility Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze custom modules, third-party apps, and OCA modules for API compatibility with Odoo 19.
examples: Check if a custom module uses removed fields
Identify controller signature changes affecting integration
Map old view attributes to Odoo 19 equivalents

capabilities.name: Staging Testing
capabilities.description: Design staging environment, smoke tests, regression tests, and parallel reconciliation procedures before production cutover.
examples: Set up staging database from production backup
Define smoke test checklist after upgrade
Run parallel reconciliation of account balances

capabilities.name: Rollback Strategy
capabilities.description: Define rollback points, database snapshots, backup procedures, and blue/green cutover strategies for failed upgrades.
examples: Create pre-upgrade database backup procedure
Design rollback plan for failed production upgrade
Implement blue/green deployment for zero-downtime cutover

capabilities.name: Odoo Upgrade Service
capabilities.description: Use Odoo SA online upgrade service, test database migration, migration scripts delivery, and validation reports.
examples: Upload database to Odoo upgrade service
Review Odoo upgrade validation report
Apply migration scripts to upgraded test database

capabilities.name: OCA Migration
capabilities.description: Use OpenUpgrade framework, openupgradelib helpers, and OCA migration scripts for community and OCA modules.
examples: Run OpenUpgrade analysis wizard for module coverage
Port OCA migration script to custom module
Check OpenUpgrade coverage for accounting modules

capabilities.name: Post-Migration Validation
capabilities.description: Run post-upgrade checks: reconcile balances, validate workflows, check user permissions, audit logs, and performance baseline.
examples: Validate general ledger balances after migration
Check all user groups are correctly mapped
Run performance baseline on critical reports
